emitterParams.note: D2 preliminary realization sketch for attention_head256_f16kv on WSE-3. Numbers are minimum-valid placeholders: peGrid width=1, shards=1, tiles=[1,1,1,1]. Real realization requires (a) attention body op in the semantic schema so residency can be planned per role (Q pe_replicated per head, KV fabric_streamed on separate colors, output pe_sliced on query axis), (b) softmax reduction representation in the reductions array (two-pass max/sum stabilization), (c) streaming KV shape that matches the workgroup-scoped shared_block pattern in the WGSL. Pinning these to placeholders keeps the fixture schema-valid while making the preliminary status obvious. Regeneration is scheduled for D3 post-B merge.

rejections.detail: Preliminary realization: attention_head256_f16kv residency is placeholder-shaped pending the semantic-schema attention body op extension. Real realization will plan Q pe_replicated per head, K and V fabric_streamed on separate colors with kv_layout-aware (dense/sliding/paged) chunk sizing, output pe_sliced on the query-position axis, and workgroup-scoped softmax reductions mapped to fabric_reduce collectives. Held pre-B merge.
